description_long: This object is a standard baseball, characterized by its spherical shape and slightly textured surface. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle grayish discolorations, giving it a somewhat weathered appearance. The surface appears to be made of leather, but no visible red stitching, seams, or laces are present in the images, which are typical features of a baseball. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or league emblems on any side of the ball. The ball's size and proportions are consistent with those used in professional and recreational baseball games. The overall finish is matte with a slightly rough texture, suggesting it has been used outdoors.
description: A white, slightly weathered baseball with a matte, textured leather surface and no visible markings or stitching.
description_view_0: This view shows a mostly uniform white surface with faint grayish spots and no visible seams or markings.
description_view_1: The surface remains consistent, with subtle discoloration and no visible stitching or logos.
description_view_2: A similar white, slightly mottled surface is visible, with no seams or branding apparent.
description_view_3: This angle also shows a plain, lightly textured white surface with no visible features or markings.
attribute_stitch_pattern: No visible stitch pattern or seams; the surface appears seamless in all views.
attribute_visible_wear_or_scuff_marks: Subtle grayish discoloration and mottling are visible across the surface, but no distinct scuff marks or damage.
